name: Internet Trust Proof Pack Export Contract
controlling_principle: CyberShield does not ask whether we trust a person. It asks which claims, artifacts, evidence paths, and reliance decisions can be trusted, at what confidence, for what purpose, and with what risk if wrong.
boundary: Static advisory prototype export contract only. No live extraction, live verification, live evidence retrieval, live URL ingestion, live scoring, political validation, legal determination, report delivery, ticketing, notifications, or workflow automation is performed.
purpose: Define one prototype export contract that consolidates artifact intake, claim table, claim-to-model trace, evidence state, runtime reliance action, human review requirement, proof sections, and explicit limitations.

sample_export.artifact_title: USAFacts / Steve Ballmer government responsibilities video
sample_export.source_note: Static prototype source note only. No live retrieval performed.
sample_export.reliance_purpose: Executive education, civic literacy, decision support, public briefing preparation, and artifact trust demonstration
sample_export.audience: executives, analysts, educators, board members, public-sector leaders
sample_export.risk_if_wrong: Bad briefing, incorrect public explanation, flawed policy interpretation, reputational damage, or inappropriate reliance on outdated fiscal assumptions
sample_export.runtime_action_summary: Most factual claims require constrain, verify, or escalate posture before executive or public reliance. One doctrine demonstration claim is allowable with caveat.

export_readiness_rules: If any high-reliance claim has missing evidence, the export must show human review required.
If evidence state is needs_verification, stale, missing, assumed, or conflicting, the export must show a caveat or escalation posture.
If the artifact is used for executive, public, legal, financial, or policy reliance, the export must disclose prototype limitations.
If a claim maps to multiple model IDs, the export must show the model trace rather than flattening it into one score.
If the output is downloaded, the boundary must remain in the exported text.
definition_of_done: Export contract appears in Proof Pack and Evidence
Export contract consolidates artifact intake and claim trace data
Export modal shows required export fields and sample export
Export text download includes explicit limitations
No live extraction, live verification, live scoring, or new top-level tab
